tools.name: provider.createUpdateGiftCardProviderbyId
tools.description: Create or update a giftcard provider from a store.

tools.name: provider.deleteGiftCardProviderbyId
tools.description: Delete a giftcard provider from a store.

tools.name: provider.getGiftCardProviderbyId
tools.description: Returns a giftcard provider from a store.

tools.name: provider.listAllGiftCardProviders
tools.description: Returns a collection of giftcard providers from a store.

tools.name: transaction.createGiftCardCancellationTransaction
tools.description: Creates a cancellation transaction to a giftcard.

tools.name: transaction.createGiftCardinGiftCardProvider
tools.description: Creates a giftcard in a giftcard provider.

tools.name: transaction.createGiftCardSettlementTransaction
tools.description: Creates a settlement transaction to a giftcard.

tools.name: transaction.createGiftCardTransaction
tools.description: Creates a transaction to a giftcard.

tools.name: transaction.getGiftCardfromGiftCardProvider
tools.description: Returns all giftcards from a giftcard provider according to the filters.

tools.name: transaction.getGiftCardfromGiftCardProviderbyId
tools.description: Returns a specific giftcard from a giftcard provider.

tools.name: transaction.getGiftCardTransactionbyId
tools.description: Returns a specific transaction from a giftcard.

tools.name: transaction.listAllGiftCardCancellationTransactions
tools.description: Returns a collection of cancellation transactions from a giftcard.

tools.name: transaction.listAllGiftCardSettlementTransactions
tools.description: Returns a collection of settlement transactions from a giftcard.

tools.name: transaction.listAllGiftCardTransactions
tools.description: Return all transaction from a giftcard.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
